assumptions: Scope: 3 fixes only (completeness veto, auto-register, GC reviews). Do NOT include --force-advance, rename repair_X_checkpoint, --validation-only, char budgets, embedding IDs, fenced-code regex, or structured reviewer output.

Completeness veto: when completeness judge votes block due to unaddressed HIGH reviewer finding, that block overrides majority vote from other judges. Escape hatches remain: checkpoint --address/--defer/--dismiss on the concern, OR deliver --override-judges --reason for emergency ship.

Auto-register: mutating commands register via a @mutates_state decorator on their command_* function. run_factory.py _STATE_MUTATING_COMMANDS becomes a computed frozenset derived from decorator metadata, not a literal. Test asserts every command_* function is decorated or explicitly tagged non-mutating.

GC reviews: at the start of checkpoint --stage X, delete reviews/X.*.narrowed.* and reviews/X.*.raw.txt and reviews/X.*.stdout.txt/.stderr.txt UNLESS --keep-intermediates is passed. Preserve reviews/X.*.review.md (the resolution-bearing file) and reviews/X.checkpoint.json (manifest).
All 167 existing runner tests must pass. Target ~190 total after this feature.
Codex implements slices after spec/plan/tasks checkpoints are healthy. Claude is orchestrator only — per ~/.claude/rules/agent-invocation.md token-saving rules.
Spec FR-005b Findings Pushed Aside section was shipped in PR #744 and will auto-surface any deferred/dismissed concerns for this feature.
discovery.summary: Feature A = FF Safety Net. Three fixes from the leftover backlog after PR #744: (1) completeness judge veto on unaddressed HIGH concerns, (2) auto-register of mutating commands instead of hand-kept frozenset, (3) garbage-collect stale review intermediates between runs. All three reinforce each other by making the FF workflow itself more trustworthy.
non_goals: Fenced-code-block regex false positive (Risk R1) — rare, pinned.
--force-advance CLI (plan Fix 3) — mostly subsumed by --override-judges + concern-lifecycle CLI; still deferred.
--validation-only flag past 3-round cap (plan Fix 5) — Feature B.
Raise default char budgets (plan Fix 7) — Feature B.
Embedding-based concern IDs (Risk R5) — Feature C.
Structured JSON reviewer output (Risk R7) — larger project.
acceptance_criteria: review.md and checkpoint.json files are never deleted by the GC — test verifies with fixture files of each type.
completeness judge block on unaddressed HIGH overrides majority proceed; test asserts judge panel with 2 proceed + 1 completeness block returns edit_and_rerun_judge not advance.
completeness veto still permits --address/--defer/--dismiss resolution; test asserts once the HIGH concern is marked resolved, panel advances normally.
_STATE_MUTATING_COMMANDS set derived from @mutates_state decorator; test asserts every existing command_* function is either decorated mutating or explicitly marked non-mutating.
Test asserts adding a fake new command_ function without decoration triggers a test failure, not a silent miss.
checkpoint --stage X at invocation deletes stale narrowed/raw/stdout/stderr files for that stage unless --keep-intermediates passed; test verifies.
